findings.title: Miss repair used official identity upsert when PNCP detail endpoint flaked
findings.detail: 11 source_gap items were captured via official external_id/URL from independent inventory after detail API 404/connection errors. Acceptable for controllable repair; document that list pagination expansion is the primary fix.

findings.title: Municipality size classification uses static KNOWN_POP with medio default
findings.detail: Does not invalidate strata floors; improve with IBGE file join later.

findings.title: SC Compras list lacks publication date
findings.detail: Items still valid official publications with stable IDs.

findings.title: DOD ACCEPTED on main not yet done
findings.detail: Campaign PASS in isolated worktree; merge/CI/accept is DevOps path.
